text:
Once upon a time in the sleepy town of Willowwood, nestled beneath ancient oak trees, there lived a chatty chipmunk named Chuck.

Chuck loved nothing more than recounting tales to his little forest friends. One autumn afternoon, while munching on a particularly juicy acorn, Chuck decided to tell a story of his own adventures.

"It all started," Chuck began, tapping his chubby cheeks thoughtfully, "when I discovered the enchanted forest berries."

The friends hung on his every word. Chuck continued, with great enthusiasm, "You see, these magical berries make anyone who eats them laugh until they cry!"

Curiosity got the better of Owlbert the owl. "Oh, tell us about that, Chuck!"

Chuck chuckled. "Well, first I found a berry that made me sing opera for hours. Then there was the time I danced for five moons straight."

The animals listened entranced. Chuck went on, "One berry made me uncontrollably happy. I started singing 'The
